# Karlo Shaadi

> India's #1 wedding planning platform. Verified vendors, milestone payments, fraud protection. Every wedding you plan helps someone get married through Shaadi Seva.

## About

Karlo Shaadi is a premium Indian wedding planning and vendor matchmaking platform. We connect couples with verified wedding vendors across categories like photography, venues, catering, decoration, mehendi, music, and more. Our tagline: "aap shaadi karo, tension hum sambhal lenge" (you focus on the wedding, we'll handle the tension).

10% of every payment on the platform goes to Shaadi Seva — a fund supporting financially disadvantaged couples and Saamuhik Vivaah (mass wedding) events.
